title: STEELEX Non-Stick Milk Pan 16cm with Dual Double Pouring Lips Non-Stick Aluminium Small Milk Pan Deep Milk Pot Water Boiling Saucepan, Grey (AL8016)
features: A heavy-duty milk pan with a high-quality non-stick surface coating perfect for general boiling, simmering, cooking or warming up food needs. Double pouring lips, easy grip handle and durable 2.5mm thick aluminium with a smooth metallic grey exterior finish ideal to warm up or boil milk, tea, coffee, soup or even sauces. It is a milk pan built for you to comfortably cook!

Dimensions of this non-stick milk pan are – Diameter: 16cm, Height: 7cm and Thickness: 2.5mm. This STEELEX Non-Stick Milk Pan is suitable for all hobs, Gas, Electric, Ceramic and Halogen EXCEPT INDUCTION. This milk pan IS DISHWASHER SAFE.

NON-STICK SURFACE COATING – Inside surface of this milk pan is crafted non-stick coating for it to easily be cleaned and minimize chances of food sticking to the surface. The non-stick coating shall make the pan more durable and you will no longer have to worry about any staining or permanent residues.

DOUBLE POURING LIPS - This non-stick milk pan has dual pouring lips for mess and spillage free pouring. Not matter if your left-handed or right-handed, with this milk pan you will always easily be able to pour out content. You don't just have to use this pan when making/warming tea, coffee or milk but can also use it to boil small portions of pasta and veg or make home-made sauces, gravy or custard.

CORE ALUMINIUM BODY FOR HIGH-QUALITY RESULTS – Now prepare food swiftly with minimal energy. This non-stick milk pan has a strong forged aluminium body to be non-toxic, non-reactive and non-staining with any food, making your cooking life easier. Aluminium has heat conductive properties which means this milk pan will provide fast and even heat distribution and eliminate chances of hotspots for you swiftly boil milk, water or even make tea.
